name: family-organizer-mcp
description: MCP server that lets Claude interact with the self-hosted Family Organizer backend.

scripts.preinstall: node -e "try{var s=require('fs').readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf8');if(/axios[/-]1\.14\.1|axios[/-]0\.30\.4/.test(s)){throw new Error('compromised axios version detected in lockfile')}}catch(e){if(e.code!=='ENOENT')throw e}"
